channel.title: Aureum Blog
channel.description: Essays on autonomous AI agents, multi-vendor LLM routing, eval harnesses, and shipping production AI as a founder. By Ureche Ionel Alexandru (@lexusthunder).

item.title: Why your engineering team ships 20% of its backlog (and how to fix it)
item.description: I asked 12 VPs of Engineering at Series B SaaS companies what their throughput rate is. The answer was uncomfortably consistent. Here's what we did about it.

item.title: How I cut Claude API costs 4.4× with a 15-line routing table
item.description: One claude-opus-4-6 everywhere is fine for a demo, lethal at scale. The fix: a routing table that maps (agent, complexity) to model.

item.title: The eval harness is the product
item.description: Without frozen tickets + golden outputs, prompt engineering becomes superstition. I run 50 tickets on every PR.

item.title: I wrote a neural network in NumPy. You should too.
item.description: Not for production. For interviews. For first principles. For the moment when a senior engineer asks what's actually happening on the backward pass.

item.title: From theology to AI engineering: the only pivot story that worked
item.description: I have a Bachelor's in Pastoral Theology. I'm applying to Google AI Engineer. Here's how I closed the credibility gap.

item.title: Genesis · Week 1: from skeleton to v1.0 in 72 hours
item.description: I shipped Aureum Genesis v1.0 in 72 hours. Real LLM clients, real GitHub PR opener, real Docker deploy, full sales kit. Here's the build log.
